sections.a_eyebrow: Professional · Minimal · Single Column · Clean UI · Readable
sections.a_description: The distinctive visual language of Resume CV Web — combining professional, minimal, single column elements to create interfaces that are immediately recognizable and purposefully designed. Every color, font choice, and spacing decision works together to evoke the specific mood and cultural context that defines this aesthetic, from the primary accent color to the carefully chosen typography.

This style finds its natural home across websites and applications that value professional and minimal design principles. You'll see it on creative portfolios, brand microsites, specialized platforms, and digital experiences where the visual language itself communicates as powerfully as the content — proving that the right aesthetic choice can transform a standard layout into a memorable experience.

a_image_cover.alt: Resume CV Web style use case illustration
Resume CV Web style use case illustration
Resume CV Web style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The distinctive visual aesthetic of Resume CV Web — a design approach that creates unique, memorable interfaces. Background: light (#ffffff). The .inner panel has a clean background with subtle border treatment and appropriate border-radius. Colors: #0f62fe as the primary accent for interactive elements and highlights. #161616 for headings, #525252 for body text. The aesthetic captures the essence of resume cv web through careful color choices, spacing, and visual weight. Set in IBM Plex Sans — chosen for its visual character that complements this design style. Heading at weight 600-700, 24-28px, line-height 1.2-1.3. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2-3px letter-spacing, color #0f62fe. Body at weight 400, 14-15px, line-height 1.6-1.7, color #525252. Buttons: primary — #0f62fe background with contrasting text. Secondary: transparent with #0f62fe border. Alternatives: system-ui (universal fallback), sans-serif stack.
